channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists discover giant sea predator Tylosaurus rex that terrorized ancient oceans
item.description: A new giant sea predator, Tylosaurus rex, has been identified from Texas fossils, revealing a 43-foot-long hunter that ruled ancient oceans.

item.title: Scientists discover the perfect temperature to keep mangoes fresh much longer
item.description: Scientists found that storing mangoes at 54°F dramatically slows ripening and keeps the fruit fresh far longer than typical tropical temperatures.

item.title: NASA's Psyche spacecraft captures stunning Mars images during high-speed flyby
item.description: NASA's Psyche spacecraft skimmed past Mars in a precision flyby that helped catapult it deeper into space toward its ultimate target: the bizarre meta...

item.title: NASA stunned as strange solar radio burst lasts 19 days
item.description: NASA scientists were stunned when a strange radio signal from the Sun refused to fade away. Instead of lasting a few hours or days like normal solar r...
